shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = L,_,W,_ : cmplog BLOCKS, value_profile_cmplog RESOLVES, value_profile & naive non-decisive. The only technique delta between the involved winner (vpc) and loser (cmplog) is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback (both already carry the IDENTICAL I2S substitution mutator). Layer-1 attribution is therefore VP CMP_MAP gradient; this test is the INDEPENDENT real-data verification (G2) of HOW that gradient advantage manifests.
round0_refuted: Round-0 bet the whole shape on ONE story: VP's gradient closes scalar value-DISTANCE at the multi-byte gate operand (NEW descriptor seed_set:value_distance_reached:multibyte_literal:per_branch -> vpc seeds land at a smaller residual Hamming/per-byte distance to the target than cmplog-blocking seeds). The deterministic arbiter scored the 7 inconclusive branches and NONE held: 4 rule_not_met, 2 unmeasurable, 1 seed_starved. Conclusion: the VPC-resolving seed set does NOT sit at a smaller residual distance to a fixed gate operand than the cmplog-blocking set. The scalar-distance-closure mechanism is empirically REFUTED for this shape and is NOT re-proposed here. (Same refutation held on sibling shape i2s_vp_LWW_; the surviving mechanism there was structural-assembly / token-availability + operand byte-enrichment.)

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient enriches the VPC-resolving corpus for the target 'size' tag bytes (73 69 7a 65) relative to decoy tag bytes (GSUB/GPOS) at the gate offset: near-miss byte matches register as new coverage, so the gradient persistently steers the saved corpus toward the exact 4-byte literal that bare I2S substitution does not persistently enrich. The gate operand is a clean CONTIGUOUS 4-byte literal (the operand_enrichment anchor case), so a fixed-offset target-vs-decoy enrichment read is the directly-applicable measurement.

measurement.registry_tool_note: BUILT tool, descriptor_key corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy:per_gate_offset, anchored on harfbuzz/5391 (validated pro median +3.12). Both members are harfbuzz (on-disk corpus) with a 4-byte CONTIGUOUS literal ('size' = 73 69 7a 65) and >=3 W / >=3 L seeds in DB (W=11 value_profile_cmplog, L=18 cmplog) -> squarely inside the tool's applies_to ('fixed-offset VALUE gates, i2s literal substitution'). No new descriptor.

operands_by_branch.harfbuzz_5474: target='size' (73 69 7a 65, 4-byte feature-record tag at FeatureParams::sanitize tag dispatch, hb-ot-layout-common.hh:688); decoys = the loser tags 'GSUB'/'GPOS' (47 53 55 42 / 47 50 4f 53) seen in cmplog-blocking seeds.
operands_by_branch.harfbuzz_5477: target='size' (73 69 7a 65, 4-byte closure tag at OT::Feature::sanitize line 813, hb-ot-layout-common.hh:812); decoys = 'GSUB'/'GPOS'/'GSHB' table tags carried by the cmplog-blocking seeds.

params.note: operand is a 4-byte contiguous literal (width=4, NOT the width<=2 chance-alignment risk regime) and CONTIGUOUS (not dispersed) -> the cleanest case for operand_enrichment, unlike the short/dispersed codepoint gates in sibling LWW_ where this tool was only a corroborant. Here it is the primary.

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0 AND signed_target_enrich > decoy_enrich: the VPC-resolving corpus is enriched for the target 'size' tag bytes relative to the GSUB/GPOS decoy bytes at the gate offset. DISCRIMINATING: (1) cmplog carries the IDENTICAL I2S substitution mutator, so if the divergence were a pure I2S byte-substitution advantage the saved corpus would NOT be persistently enriched for the target (I2S substitutes the operand on demand at mutation time without leaving a near-miss-enriched corpus) -> signed_target_enrich ~ 0; a clearly positive value is the signature uniquely attributable to VP's gradient-driven admission of near-miss-then-exact corpus members. (2) chance co-occurrence of 'size' bytes -> would not exceed decoy_enrich. RULED OUT: the refuted scalar-distance story (which measured residual Hamming distance, not whole-token byte enrichment) AND the pure-I2S story.

hypotheses.label: corroborant: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient drives corpus admission toward seeds that physically CONTAIN the 'size' feature tag (and toward larger seeds carrying a feature-list with the size record), because the gradient rewards partial assembly that edge-only feedback discards. A token-availability / structural-assembly advantage, orthogonal to scalar distance and to byte enrichment.

measurement.registry_tool_note: BUILT tool, descriptor_key seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count:tokens:per_branch. Used in analyze_pair(winner_fz=value_profile_cmplog, loser_fz=cmplog) mode -- L_W_ has NO plain value_profile blocking seeds (vp is non-decisive), so the 3-arm joint i2s_necessary/vp_tags mode is N/A; the discriminating contrast is the W=VPC-resolving vs L=cmplog-blocking pair the tool's analyze_pair mode already emits as winner_tags/loser_tags/tag_lift/size_lift. No code change -- the entry point exists.

tokens_by_target.harfbuzz_5474: --tokens 'size' (73 69 7a 65) -- count of sfnt/feature 'size' tag occurrences per seed; the gate needs the size feature record present in the FeatureList, so token PRESENCE is the structural signal.

params.note: SINGLE-token gate (only 'size') -> weaker token signal than a multi-token conjunction; the rule leans on tag_lift OR size_lift so a corpus that simply carries the 'size' tag (or a larger feature-list seed) more often in the VPC arm still confirms. Ranked SECOND because this is fundamentally the same target byte-run as H1; H1's enrichment read is the sharper primary.

hypotheses.prediction: tag_lift = winner_tags - loser_tags >= 1.0 OR size_lift = winner_size/loser_size >= 1.3: the VPC-resolving seed set carries at least one MORE 'size' tag occurrence than the cmplog-blocking set, and/or is >=30% larger. DISCRIMINATING vs the refuted scalar-distance story (it counts whole-token PRESENCE / assembly EXTENT, not residual Hamming distance) AND vs a pure-I2S story (identical I2S mutator -> if I2S byte-substitution were the driver the two arms would place the 'size' tag equally, tag_lift ~ 0 AND size_lift ~ 1.0). ALTERNATIVE RULED OUT: 'cmplog already assembles the same feature-list, just stalls on the final tag compare' -> tag_lift ~ 0 AND size_lift ~ 1.0.

hypotheses.label: honest non-discriminable: the 5 lcms/libpng/libxml2 branches have NO on-disk corpus (off-server: sB owns these targets; on-disk corpora exist only for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3) AND confirmed ZERO resolving/blocking seeds in db/blockers.sqlite, so NO built seed/corpus tool (operand_enrichment, joint_necessity, value_distance_reached) can score them on THIS server. depth_reach also needs the seed sets it runs through the cov image, so it cannot stand as an INDEPENDENT (G2) signal here either. There is no built measurement on this server that can discriminate VP's mechanism for these branches.
hypotheses.off_server_note: sB owns lcms/libpng/libxml2 corpora. This is an OFF-SERVER data gap, NOT an off-server decidable:false dodge of a real test: confirmed 0 resolving_seeds + 0 blocking_seeds in this server's db/blockers.sqlite for all 5, and the targets are absent from the on-disk corpus set {curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3}. H1 (operand_enrichment) and H2 (joint_necessity) WOULD apply to the 4-byte / range / cascade literal gates among these (lcms Lab/XYZ FOURCC, libpng ICC-char range, libxml2 'xmlns' cascade, libxml2 ':' adjacency) if sB scores them with these same two descriptors. libxml2_8100 (none_structural operand, DTD internal-subset lookahead) has no fixed literal and is the weakest even on sB -- likely inconclusive there too.
hypotheses.prediction: N/A on this server -- no built measurement applies (0 seeds in DB; targets not in on-disk corpus set).
hypotheses.rule: decidable:false -> these branches carry the Layer-1 VP-gradient label but get NO independent confirmation on this server; the arbiter leaves them inconclusive (fallback). If sB owns the corpus, sB applies H1/H2's descriptors to the 4 literal-bearing branches (lcms_2090, libpng_4145, libxml2_6719, libxml2_9841) and writes its own assignment.

data_realities_respected: value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK not a mutator -> NOT measured via any seed_lineage 'gradient event'. Its effect is read off the corpus the gradient ADMITTED -- operand byte enrichment (operand_enrichment) and structural size + token count (joint_necessity) -- both corpus-state computes, no lineage event.
I2S is NOT tagged in mutation_op -> NO seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence on an I2S event proposed.

on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3 -> only harfbuzz_5474/5477 are seed-measurable on this server; the 5 lcms/libpng/libxml2 branches are honestly marked decidable:false (confirmed 0 seeds in DB, off-server).

L_W_ has NO plain value_profile arm in the corpus (vp is non-decisive, so no value_profile BLOCKING seeds) -> joint_necessity is used in analyze_pair(VPC vs cmplog) mode, NOT its 3-arm joint i2s_necessary mode (vp_tags is N/A here).

the 'size' tag operand is a 4-byte CONTIGUOUS fixed-offset literal (width=4, not the width<=2 chance-alignment regime) -> byte_freq_ratio (operand_enrichment) applies cleanly as the PRIMARY here, unlike the dispersed/short codepoint gates in sibling LWW_ where it was only a corroborant.
notes:
DROPPED the single round-0 hypothesis (vp_gradient_climbs_multibyte_cmp_beyond_i2s via the unbuilt seed_set:value_distance_reached:multibyte_literal:per_branch descriptor). Round-0's scalar value-DISTANCE-closure story was scored against real seeds (or fell to unmeasurable) for all 7 branches and confirmed NONE (4 rule_not_met, 2 unmeasurable, 1 seed_starved). This round pivots to BUILT descriptors the round-0 author did NOT use -- exactly the pivot that succeeded on sibling i2s_vp_LWW_.

WHY this is a genuinely different mechanism, not a reword: round-0 measured PROXIMITY (residual Hamming distance to one operand). H1 measures byte-PRESENCE ENRICHMENT (target vs decoy frequency in the saved corpus), H2 measures whole-token PRESENCE + assembly EXTENT (count of 'size' tags + seed size). A seed can be FAR in Hamming residual from any single fixed operand yet still carry the discrete 'size' tag at the right adjacency and be larger -- distance and presence/enrichment are orthogonal, which is precisely why presence/enrichment can hold after distance failed.

WHY H1 is primary (not H2 as on LWW_): both harfbuzz members gate on a SINGLE clean CONTIGUOUS 4-byte literal 'size' (73 69 7a 65). That is the operand_enrichment anchor case (harfbuzz/5391, validated +3.12) -- a fixed-offset target-vs-decoy byte read is the sharpest available signal. On LWW_ the gates were DISPERSED / SHORT (2-byte codepoints) so byte_freq_ratio was demoted to corroborant and joint_necessity (multi-token conjunctions) led. Here the token signal is single ('size' only), so the multi-token structural read is weaker and ranks second. The two reuse the SAME underlying 4-byte run, so a confirm on either, with H1 sharper, suffices.

NO NEW DESCRIPTOR NEEDED: both decidable hypotheses reuse a BUILT registry tool by descriptor_key (operand_enrichment = corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy:per_gate_offset; joint_necessity = seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count:tokens:per_branch, analyze_pair mode). No code change.

DISCRIMINABILITY HONESTY (G1/G3): H1 + H2 are decidable for the 2 on-disk harfbuzz branches; if BOTH fail for a seed-bearing branch, VP's advantage there is genuinely neither byte-enrichment nor structural-assembly, and that branch correctly falls to inconclusive (do not chase 100%). H3 covers the 5 lcms/libpng/libxml2 branches as decidable:false -- an HONEST off-server / no-corpus gap (0 seeds confirmed), NOT a dodge; H1/H2's descriptors transfer to the 4 literal-bearing ones (lcms_2090 FOURCC, libpng_4145 ICC-char range, libxml2_6719 ':' adjacency, libxml2_9841 'xmlns' cascade) for sB to apply, while libxml2_8100 (none_structural, DTD lookahead) has no fixed literal and is the weakest fit anywhere.

G2 INDEPENDENCE: both metrics are read off the seed-set / corpus byte composition, computed independently of the vpc-resolves pattern that DEFINED the shape (the shape's label-source is the Layer-1 resolve code; the verification-signal is corpus byte enrichment + token/size counts).

EXPECTED OUTCOME: harfbuzz_5474 and 5477 are the SAME 'size' tag mechanism at two adjacent sanitize sites with identical seed sets (W=11 vpc / L=18 cmplog each) -> they should co-resolve. Most likely H1 (signed_target_enrich > 0 for the contiguous 'size' literal) confirms both; H2 corroborates if the VPC corpus also carries the size feature-list more / larger.
